assessment_objectives.objective: accounts and/or account types for which to limit the number of concurrent sessions is defined.
the number of concurrent sessions to be allowed for each account and/or account type is defined.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: three (3) sessions for privileged access and two (2) sessions for non-privileged access

assessment_objectives.objective: the number of concurrent sessions for each organization-defined account and/or account types is limited to organization-defined number.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: three (3) sessions for privileged access and two (2) sessions for non-privileged access
